# Test basic JSON scanner functionality
#
# This test verifies that mcpspy correctly parses and formats JSON messages

# Basic JSON parsing test
cat input.json | mcpspy -f output.log -v

# Verify that all JSON objects are correctly parsed and output
grep -c "mcp-recv" output.log
stdout 3
cat output.log
stdout "mcp-recv {"
stdout '"method": "initialize"'
stdout '"method": "tools/list"'
stdout '"method": "tools/call"'

# Test files to be used
-- input.json --
{"method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "clientInfo": {"name": "test-client", "version": "1.0.0"}, "capabilities": {}}}
{"method": "tools/list", "params": {}}
{"method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "TestTool", "arguments": {"key": "value"}}}
